dc:title.label: Title
dc:title.description: A name given to the resource.

dc:creator.label: Creator
dc:creator.description: An entity responsible for making the resource.

dc:date.label: Date
dc:date.description: A point or period of time associated with an event in the lifecycle of the resource.

dc:type.label: Type
dc:type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

dc:format.label: Format
dc:format.description: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource.

dc:identifier.label: Identifier
dc:identifier.description: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

dc:source.label: Source
dc:source.description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

dc:coverage.label: Coverage
dc:coverage.description: The spatial or temporal topic of the resource, spatial applicability of the resource, or jurisdiction under which the resource is relevant.

dc:rights.label: Rights
dc:rights.description: Information about rights held in and over the resource.
